name: TMAP API
description: TMAP Mobilitys navigation, traffic and ETA APIs — the de facto Korean driving-navigation SDK.

seo.title: TMAP API — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: TMAP API: TMAP Mobilitys navigation, traffic and ETA APIs — the de facto Korean driving-navigation SDK.

when_to_use: Korean driving navigation and real-time traffic APIs
ETA and routing for Korean logistics and delivery apps
In-car navigation SDK for Korean automotive applications
Ride-hailing trip routing using Korea's most-used nav data
Address search and geocoding for Korean map-based apps

pros: Default driving nav in Korea, huge user base
Real-time traffic built on SK Telecom data
APIs cover routing, traffic, and geocoding
cons: Terms and billing change with SKT strategy
review.verdict: Non-negotiable for Korean navigation apps; no other API matches its local routing accuracy.
review.best_for: Apps shipping driving features to Korean drivers
review.not_for: Global apps with only marginal Korean coverage

lock_in.reason: Korea-specific nav APIs, hard to swap
